content:
INTELLIGENCE BRIEFING — Tue, 17 Feb 2026 13:07:06 GMT
Overall Threat Level: CRITICAL
Total Events: 236 | Critical: 74 | High: 22 | Medium: 23 | Low: 117

CRITICAL ALERTS:
  [AFRICA] Pact to end two-day strike after long delays hit travellers at Kenya's main airport (BBC Africa)
  [UKRAINE] Iran temporarily closing Strait of Hormuz for live fire drills as nuclear talks with US begin (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Rev . Jesse Jackson has died . And , U . S . and Iran set for high - stakes nuclear talks (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Brink of war : President Trump demanding Iran abandon its nuclear program or face military action (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Iran-US talks restart as Khamenei warns Islamic Republic will not be destroyed (Middle East Eye)

REGIONAL ASSESSMENT:
  Middle East (50 events, 25 critical, 4 high):
    - Rev . Jesse Jackson has died . And , U . S . and Iran set for high - stakes nuclear talks
    - Brink of war : President Trump demanding Iran abandon its nuclear program or face military action
    - Iran-US talks restart as Khamenei warns Islamic Republic will not be destroyed
  Ukraine/Russia (24 events, 9 critical, 2 high):
    - Iran temporarily closing Strait of Hormuz for live fire drills as nuclear talks with US begin
    - US and Iran hold nuclear talks as threat of war looms
    - US and Iran Begin Nuclear Talks in Geneva as Threat of War Looms
  Europe (35 events, 15 critical, 5 high):
    - Austrian man faces terror charges over Taylor Swift concert attack plot
    - 'We will discriminate': Elon Musk-backed Restore Britain party launches with hard-right vision
    - Sudan war: Sanctions and donor pledges do not fix the catastrophe on the ground
  Indo-Pacific (33 events, 3 critical, 2 high):
    - Bondi Beach shooting accused faces court for the first time
    - North Korea draws new red line, vows attack over future airspace ‘violations’
    - Gilded Capability: Overinvestment and the Survivability Paradox
  United States (8 events, 1 critical, 2 high):
    - Inside the Strike: The US Munition That Hit a Residential Building in Venezuela
    - US boards second oil tanker in Indian Ocean after it fled Venezuelan raid
    - Pentagon to deploy roughly 200 troops to Nigeria
  Global (68 events, 12 critical, 6 high):
    - Seven Ghanaian traders killed in Burkina Faso militant attack
    - Austria Charges Man in Thwarted Attack on Taylor Swift Concert
    - Saudi Arabia buys C-27 cargo planes fitted for armed maritime patrols

Sources: BBC Africa, GDELT, Middle East Eye, NYT World, BBC World, Al Jazeera, War on the Rocks, BBC Europe, Defense News, BBC Asia, NK News, BBC Middle East, The Guardian, Breaking Defense, CISA Advisories, Bellingcat, BBC Latin America, The Diplomat
